race.comment: HARRY (4) failed to threaten last time at Warren but was right there in his first two starts. Willing to forgive. BLUE BIDDY (10) is a daughter of Bivouac out of Blue Money having her first start. Looks forward enough following a trial win with Zoe Hunt aboard. Can play a major role on debut. BILLABONG BRAVE (2) is a Brave Smash gelding on debut for the Thompson yard. Strips fitter for a trial and should be sharpened by the blinkers. Can make an immediate impact. NUCLEAIRE (6) gave backers a bold sight fresh at Parkes but failed to follow it up in the slop last time. Good signs with JPH sticking, so willing to give another go.
